certificate.module_name: Microsoft Windows 8, Microsoft Windows Server 2012, Microsoft Windows RT, Microsoft Surface Windows RT, Microsoft Surface Windows 8 Pro, Microsoft Windows Phone 8, and Microsoft Windows Storage Server 2012 BitLocker® Windows OS Loader (WINLOAD)
certificate.caveat: When operated in FIPS mode with module Microsoft Windows 8, Microsoft Windows Server 2012, Microsoft Windows RT, Microsoft Surface Windows RT, Microsoft Surface Windows 8 Pro, and Microsoft Windows Phone 8 Boot Manager validated to FIPS 140-2 under Cert. #1895 operating in FIPS mode
certificate.description: The BitLocker® Windows OS Loader loads the boot-critical driver and OS kernel image files. Please note that AES (Cert. #2197) is only used in the entropy source for the module. This particular instance of AES is labeled as non-compliant because it does not perform a power-up self-test. This cryptographic module also maintains FIPS 140-2 validation compliance (according to FIPS 140-2 PUB Implementation Guidance G.5) on Microsoft Windows 8, Microsoft Windows 8 Pro, and Microsoft Windows Server 2012 Datacenter.
